name: Mortgage Advisor - Initial Quality Baseline
description: Establish quality baseline by labeling first successful traces and key failure cases

trace_selection_strategy.rationale: Mix of successful and failed traces to understand both good and bad patterns

selection.priority: HIGH - These are your only successful traces. Label these first!

labeling_guidelines: Focus on the 4 successful traces first - these define 'good quality'
For failed traces, note what went wrong in the 'Issues & Notes' field
Be consistent: use the same standards for all traces
When uncertain, be honest (use middle ratings like 'Acceptable' or 'Adequate')
The 'Issues & Notes' text field is valuable - use it!
